scripts.lint: node --check scripts/run-workspace-command.mjs && node --check scripts/service-command.mjs && node --check scripts/dev-all.mjs && node --check scripts/stop-local-services.mjs && node --check scripts/test-root-foundation.mjs && node --check scripts/root-env.mjs && node --check scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs && node scripts/run-workspace-command.mjs lint
scripts.e2e: corepack pnpm compose:dev && node scripts/run-workspace-command.mjs e2e
scripts.compose:dev: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.compose:dev:logs: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f postgres redis
